hypothesis: Integrating a layout-aware molecular-figure detector fine-tuned on ChemX-style PDFs with DECIMER-based OCSR and a cross-mention InChIKey consistency filter will increase SMILES extraction F1 to ≥0.40 on the ChemX Complexes dataset while keeping the F1 of all non-SMILES fields within ±0.02 of the single-agent GPT-5 baseline.
